description: Single use case in production for a small, focused team. Ideal for organizations beginning their analytics journey with one well-defined business problem.
useCases: Single production analytics use case (e.g., churn prediction, credit scoring)
hadrNotes: Single-site deployment with scheduled backups to object storage. Acceptable maintenance windows for planned upgrades.
cloudVsOnprem: Cloud recommended for faster provisioning and lower upfront cost. On-prem if data sovereignty requirements prevent cloud access.
typicalCustomers: Mid-size banks starting analytics, single-department deployments, regional companies
